name: Shrimp Mold
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine cream cheese, soup, and onion.
2. Heat until all ingredients are dissolved and blended.
3. Add mayonaise and mix well; remove from heat.
4. Sprinkle gelatin over water in a small bowl and let it dissolve.
5. Mix the celery and seafood into the soup mixture.
6. Stir in the dissolved gelatin, ensuring everything is well combined.
7. Pour the mixture into a 6-cup mold and chill until set.
8. Serve with sourdough rolls thinly sliced and crackers.
